meaning: v.鎷嶆墜鍠濆僵,绉拌禐,璧炲悓
examples: He started to applaud and the others joined in.
The analysts applaud the cuts in marginal businesses, but insist the company must make deeper sacrifices.
And they applaud the government's decision to offer cash sweeteners to people near shale gas facilities.
For what it is worth, I applaud the game the players gave us on Sunday.
